sentiment: The library lends what you didn't know you needed; the app sees what you didn't know was watching.

stories.title: Loupe – A iOS app that raises awareness about what native apps can see
stories.summary: An app that reveals the hidden data access happening on your phone—what apps see when you're not looking.

stories.title: Renting a sewing machine from the library
stories.summary: Finnish libraries lend everything from sewing machines to power tools—community sharing beyond books.

stories.title: Developers don't understand CORS (2019)
stories.summary: The web's most misunderstood security boundary reveals how we build walls we don't fully comprehend.
